# WatchDeck Environment Variables
# Generated by: watchdeck init

# Database connection string (required)
# The URI scheme picks the backend — mongodb:// / mongodb+srv:// for MongoDB,
# postgres:// / postgresql:// for Postgres. Examples:
#   MongoDB:        mongodb://localhost:27017/watchdeck
#   MongoDB Atlas:  mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net/watchdeck
#   Postgres:       postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/watchdeck
#   Supabase:       postgres://postgres.[PROJECT]:[PASSWORD]@aws-0-[REGION].pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres?sslmode=require
#                   ↑ use the Session Pooler URL (port 5432). The "Direct"
#                     URL (db.[PROJECT].supabase.co) is IPv6-only on new
#                     projects and fails DNS on many Windows boxes.
MX_DB_URI={{DB_URI}}

# Collection / table prefix (default: mx_)
MX_DB_PREFIX={{DB_PREFIX}}

# 32-character encryption key for storing sensitive channel credentials
MX_ENCRYPTION_KEY={{ENCRYPTION_KEY}}
